niche: Agentic AI, LLMs, ML Engineering, Deep Learning, AI from scratch

forbidden_phrases: I hope this message finds you well

tone_guardrails.passive_voice: reject — write in first person, active voice
tone_guardrails.general_leads: reject — lead with specific, not general (e.g. 'I built a ViT in PyTorch last week' not 'I've been working on computer vision')
tone_guardrails.performance_confidence: reject — tone should feel grounded, not broadcasting from a stage

private_topics: Do not speculate on or invent personal struggles not mentioned in his profile
Do not reference exact grades, ranks, or academic performance
Do not imply he has a job or income from AI work — he's a student, not yet employed in the field
Do not mention anything about family background or financial situation
